name: session-relay
description: Cross-session, cross-project, cross-tool agent message bus (Claude Code + Codex). A SessionStart hook auto-registers each session and drains its inbox; an MCP server (bus) exposes whoami/register/roster/send/inbox over a shared on-disk store keyed by session id; and a relay CLI wakes an idle target with a tool-aware doorbell — headless `claude -p --resume` (from its project dir) or `codex exec resume`.
